calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Jan-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Judgment And Of Nonappearance.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. No opposition. Motion is granted. (NOTE: The motion requests the complaint be dismissed without prejudice. The Order will be corrected to conform to the motion.)

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/MEW)
